content.verdict: Cliff Side Suites brings contemporary design to the Fira caldera — 14 modern suites perched directly on the cliff, each with panoramic caldera views and most with a private plunge pool. Unlike Oia, Fira puts you at the heart of Santorini's nightlife, shopping, and restaurant scene, all within walking distance. The property is smaller and more boutique than many Fira hotels, and the sharply designed infinity pool hanging over the caldera is one of the more photogenic in town. For honeymooners who want caldera views plus proximity to the action — and don't mind a bit more ambient buzz in exchange for better value — Cliff Side Suites is a smart choice.
content.best_room: Honeymoon Suite with private plunge pool and caldera view — direct sunset exposure, private terrace, and modern contemporary interior with vaulted ceilings.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Transfer, settle in, sunset cocktails on your terrace, dinner in Fira
itinerary_7_nights.description: Transfer, settle in, sunset cocktails on your terrace, dinner in Fira.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Walk the caldera path toward Firostefani (1 hour, stunning), back for pool after
itinerary_7_nights.description: Walk the caldera path toward Firostefani (1 hour, stunning), back for pool afternoon.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Day trip to Oia — explore in the morning before cruise crowds, lunch at Ammoudi,
itinerary_7_nights.description: Day trip to Oia — explore in the morning before cruise crowds, lunch at Ammoudi, back for Fira sunset.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Beach day at Perissa or Kamari (the east coast is a 20-minute drive)
itinerary_7_nights.description: Beach day at Perissa or Kamari (the east coast is a 20-minute drive).

caveats: Fira is the busiest town on Santorini — don't expect Oia-level serenity.
Cable car and cruise ship arrivals bring crowds midday; plan accordingly.
The hotel is small and doesn't have a full spa — in-suite treatments only.
Not adults-only, though the suite-only inventory skews couples.

faqs.q: Is Cliff Side Suites in Oia or Fira?
faqs.a: Fira — the island's capital, with the best restaurants and nightlife and a more lively atmosphere than Oia.
No, but with only 14 suites and suite-category inventory, couples dominate.

faqs.q: How does Fira compare to Oia for honeymooners?
faqs.a: Fira is busier but has better restaurants and more to do. Oia has the iconic sunset but can feel overrun. Many couples split between the two.

faqs.q: Does every room have a caldera view?
faqs.a: Yes. Cliff Side Suites is built directly on the caldera edge with front-facing suites only.
No on-site beach. East-coast beaches (Kamari, Perissa) are a 15-25 minute drive.
Contemporary design with modern bathrooms and tech — one of the more recently updated boutique properties in Fira.
